product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: 90deg Gutter Angle
product.description: This Alutec Half Round product is most popular with owners of small to medium houses. Alutec offer systems that are resistant to corrosion and won't fade. In addition to this they don't require much maintanence and are very easy to fix into sealed fixing points on all unions and outlets.The 90 degree angle is used with the Alutec circular (63mm) downpipe system and is suitable for those looking for a standard capacity rainwater system.  A full list of colours can be found below, the standard finish is in Heritage Black but additional Powder Coated Colours are also available.  Please see the Marley Alutec product brochure linked below to find out more information.   Delivery: Heritage Black 3 to 5 working days. Powder Coated Colours 10 to 15 working days.  All orders containing fittings only.  Order value,  200 = 30+ VAT delivery fee  Order value  500 = 20+ VAT delivery fee  Order value  500 = 16.63+ VAT delivery fee

product.name: 90deg Gutter Angle
product.description: This Alutec Half Round product is most popular with owners of small to medium houses. Alutec offer systems that are resistant to corrosion and won't fade. In addition to this they don't require much maintanence and are very easy to fix into sealed fixing points on all unions and outlets.The 90 degree angle is used with the Alutec circular (63mm) downpipe system and is suitable for those looking for a standard capacity rainwater system.  A full list of colours can be found below, the standard finish is in Heritage Black but additional Powder Coated Colours are also available.  Please see the Marley Alutec product brochure linked below to find out more information.   Delivery: Heritage Black 3 to 5 working days. Powder Coated Colours 10 to 15 working days.  All orders containing fittings only.  Order value,  200 = 30+ VAT delivery fee  Order value  500 = 20+ VAT delivery fee  Order value  500 = 16.63+ VAT delivery fee

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Snow Guard
product.description: With the UK weather conditions becoming increasingly unpredictable, installing Floplast's Snow / Tile Guard ensures your property is protected, as well as preventing unnecessary injury from falling tiles, snow and debris.    Easy to handle and straightforward to install.   Prevents snow/tile slippage.   2m wide x 162mm high.   Brackets should be fitted at a maximum of 800mm centres, using two No.2 12 x 1" round head screws.  Galvanised - for long lasting performance.   Protects conservatories from falling roof tiles.   Assists in reducing insurance costs/claims caused by snow/tile damage.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

Lindab SRORM75  **(Please select the Silver Metallic colour to match Galvanised products)**  Please Note: All Lindab Products are currently carrying a lead time of 5-7 days  For small component orders that do not include lengths. (66.00 inc vat)  For delivery to Northern Ireland, Scottish Highlands and other Offshore UK Addresses, please contact our sales team on 01354 700853 or by email at Sales@DrainageOnline.co.uk.
